prompt:
QA filed two tickets against the workboard app this morning and I can't see how either is possible. Both reproduce on a clean checkout — `python3 test_workboard.py` covers them.

1. Rename doesn't stick anywhere visible. PATCH /api/projects/1 with a new name returns 200 with the new name in the body, and GET /api/projects/1 agrees — but the dashboard page and the project page keep showing the OLD name no matter how many times you refresh. Strange detail from QA: the moment anyone adds or closes an item on that project, the new name suddenly shows up everywhere.

2. Archiving is dead. POST /api/projects/1/archive with {"confirm": true} comes back 404 — but GET /api/routes lists the archive route, spelled exactly the way we're calling it, and every other route in that dump responds fine.

Please work out what's actually going on and fix it. test_workboard.py is the acceptance bar and is read-only.
